commands.payload:
Revo.Tools.DatabaseMigrator 1.38.1+12b0b95bc39b6b6386a5cefd3a570b2a08ed957b
Copyright (c) 2017-2025 Martin Zima

  upgrade    Upgrades the database to newer version.

  preview    Upgrades the database to newer version.

  help       Display more information on a specific command.

  version    Display version information.

result.stdout:
info: Revo.Tools.DatabaseMigrator.Program[0]
      Revo Database Migrator (v. 1.38.1.0) tool running in standalone mode
result.stderr:
Revo.Tools.DatabaseMigrator 1.38.1+12b0b95bc39b6b6386a5cefd3a570b2a08ed957b
Copyright (c) 2017-2025 Martin Zima

  -c, --connectionString    Required. Connection string for the database
                            provider.

  -p, --databaseProvider    Required. Used database provider. Currently
                            supported values are: Npgsql, SqlServer, SQLite.

  -a, --assemblies          Assemblies containing NinjectModules to load.
                            Migrator will execute all migrations registered in
                            these modules.

  -d, --directoryPaths      Directory paths to recursively search for migration
                            files. This is not needed when 'assemblies' are
                            specified. Finds any files matching the
                            'fileNameRegex'.

  -f, --fileNameRegex       Regex for matching the names of files found when
                            specifying 'directoryPaths'. Default is:
                            ^(?<module>[a-z0-9\-]+)(?:_(?<baseline>baseline))?(?
                            :_(?<repeatable>repeatable))?(?:_(?<version>\d+(?:\.
                            \d+)*))?(?:_(?<tag>[a-z0-9\-]+)(?:,(?<tag>[a-z0-9\-]
                            +))*)?\.sql$

  -m, --modules             Names of modules to migrate. If empty, will migrate
                            all found modules. May also specify the target
                            version of every module and/or use wildcards like
                            this: 'mycompany-*@1.2.3'.;

  -e, --environmentTags     Additional environment tags.

  --help                    Display this help screen.

  --version                 Display version information.
